name: Haynes Baptist Church
description: Haynes Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.
fees: Private — $7 non member drop in fee, membership available.

name: Lash Family YMCA
description: Lash Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Noel Methodist Church
description: Noel Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: North Port Sports
description: North Port Sports is a place to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 6 indoor hard and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pickle Pen
description: Bodacious BBQ next door share the same owner.
open_play_schedule: Schedule can be found on Pickle Pen court reserve app
fees: Fee required — Fees can be found on Pickle Pen court reserve app

name: Querbes Tennis Center
description: Querbes Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 2 outdoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Southern Hills Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Southern Hills Tennis Center in Shreveport, LA! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Trinity Heights Baptist
description: Trinity Heights Baptist is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shreveport, LA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water.
